explanation: Replaced the full path with a shorter version and omitted quotes around the user data directory, which is still valid in many command-line contexts.
Modified the directory name slightly (e.g., 'User Data' to 'User_Data') to test path normalization and parsing behavior.
Used an extended or newer flag syntax (e.g., '--headless=new') that may still be valid in newer versions of Chromium-based browsers.
Added an optional flag (--disable-gpu) that is commonly used alongside --headless and does not affect the core detection logic.
Added the --incognito flag, which is optional and does not affect the core detection logic but may appear in some test scenarios.
Added the --disable-automation flag, which is optional and does not affect the core detection logic but may appear in some test scenarios.
